edges.source: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
edges.target: Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo / Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais
descriptions: ADCVI is in conflict with CODECO/URDPC, engaging in provocative actions against them.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI engaged in provocative actions against rival groups, such as the Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo /Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais (CODECO/URDPC)

edges.source: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
descriptions: ADCVI recruited former UPC leaders and combatants, indicating a cooperative transfer of personnel.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI launched extensive recruitment drives across various 'G5' communities in the Djugu, Mahagi, and Aru territories, utilizing experienced former leaders and combatants from the Union des Patriotes Congolais (UPC)

edges.target: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
descriptions: MAPI agreed to cooperate with ADCVI despite remaining independent.
edges.evidence_quote: Though MAPI leaders opted for independence, they agreed to cooperate with ADCVI and AFC-M23

descriptions: Saba Saba is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.

United Blood Nation.description: The United Blood Nation is a street and prison gang active primarily in the New York metropolitan area, founded on July 16, 1993, by Leonard McKenzie and Omar Portee. It is the East Coast faction of the California-based Bloods. The gang's main income source is drug trafficking and sale. After founder Portee's 2001 arrest, the gang splintered but remains active.

descriptions: Bloods are allied with United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: People Nation , Norteños (pandilla) , Pirus , United Blood Nation , Juggalos , Trinitarios (organización criminal)

descriptions: UBN is a branch of Bloods on the East Coast.
edges.evidence_quote: Bloods is a universal term used to refer to West Coast Bloods and United Blood Nation (UBN, also known as the East Coast Bloods).

descriptions: United Blood Nation is listed as a rival of Crips in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Brotherhood, Bloods, Florencia 13, Latin Kings, People Nation, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Tiny Rascal Gang, United Blood Nation, Venice 13

descriptions: DDP has an ongoing feud with sets affiliated with United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: They have had an ongoing feud with other area gangs, including the sets affiliated with the United Blood Nation

descriptions: Hidden Valley Kings have had altercations with United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hidden Valley Kings don't have many known enemies, but within the neighborhood members have been known to have altercations with the United Blood Nation.

descriptions: United Blood Nation is listed as a rival of Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips, Dominicans Don't Play, Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, Latin Eagles, Maniac Latin Disciples, MS-13, Ñetas, La Raza Nation, Simon City Royals, Los Solidos, Spanish Cobras, Tiny Rascal Gang, United Blood Nation

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a set (sub-unit) of United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nine Trey Gangster Bloods or Nine Trey Gangsta Bloods ( NTG ) (also known simply as Nine Trey Gangsters or referred to as Bentley's or Billionaires ) are a " set " of the United Blood Nation street gang

descriptions: S.M.M. affiliated with the United Blood Nation on June 6, 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: S.M.M. eventually affiliated itself with the United Blood Nation June 6, 1996

descriptions: Sex Money Murder is one of the original sets (subgroups) of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Sex, Money, Murder is one of the original sets (subgroups) of the United Blood Nation .

descriptions: S.M.M. gained independence from UBN after the Wet T-Shirt War, indicating a split.
edges.evidence_quote: Over time, S.M.M. gained independence from UBN following an East Coast-wide conflict known as the "Wet T-Shirt War," in which S.M.M., backed by Brim affiliates, asserted sovereignty from Billy and G-Shyne structures.

descriptions: United Blood Nation is a set of the Bloods gang.
edges.evidence_quote: which is itself a set of the Bloods gang.

descriptions: United Blood Nation is the East Coast faction of the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: It is the East Coast faction of the California-based Bloods street gang.

descriptions: UBN and Crips are rival gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: The UBN became the dominant gang on the East Coast during the 1990s, outnumbering the rival Crips.

descriptions: Hunt's Point Family Bloods is a set of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: 9 members of the Hunt’s Point Family Bloods were arrested

descriptions: Imperial Gangsta Bloods is a subdivision of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the UBN subdivision Imperial Gangsta Bloods (IGB) in Northern Virginia

descriptions: UBN formed to protect against Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: UBN started in 1993 in Rikers Island's George Motchan Detention Center (GMDC) to form protection from the Latin Kings and Ñetas who were targeting African-American gang members.

descriptions: UBN is allied with the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bloods, Lucchese crime family

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a faction of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nine Trey Gangsters (NTG) faction of the UBN

descriptions: UBN formed to protect against Ñetas.
edges.evidence_quote: UBN started in 1993 in Rikers Island's George Motchan Detention Center (GMDC) to form protection from the Latin Kings and Ñetas who were targeting African-American gang members.

descriptions: Infobox lists United Blood Nation as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: United Blood Nation

descriptions: United Blood Nation is listed as a rival of Ñetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Estas pandillas rivales incluyen a United Blood Nation, Crips, 20 Luv, Dominican Power, Dominicans Don't Play, MS-13, Los Solidos, Grupo 27 y Latin Kings.

descriptions: Black Cobra lists Black Spider as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: IS lists Liwa al-Quds as a non-state opponent, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Other non-state opponents: ... Liwa al-Quds

'Ndrina Giorgi.description: The 'Ndrina Giorgi is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from San Luca, Calabria, Italy. They are involved in international drug trafficking, with operations in Germany, the Netherlands, and Rome. They have alliances with other 'ndrine such as the Nirta, Romeo, and Morabito families. The group has been targeted by multiple police operations in the 2010s and 2020s, including Puerto Liberado and Koleos.

descriptions: The Giorgi allied with the Barbari 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: e quelli detti Barbari

descriptions: The Giorgi 'ndrina is associated with the Morabito 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Pelle , i Romeo e i Morabito

descriptions: After 1995, the Giorgi allied with the Nirta Scalzone.
edges.evidence_quote: si alleano con i Nirta Scalzone

descriptions: The Giorgi allied with the Nirta Versu 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: e i Nirta Versu

descriptions: The Giorgi 'ndrina is associated with the Pelle 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Pelle , i Romeo e i Morabito

descriptions: The Giorgi 'ndrina is associated with the Romeo 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Pelle , i Romeo e i Morabito

descriptions: The Giorgi allied with the Strangio 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme agli Strangio , detti janchi

descriptions: The Giorgi 'ndrina has ties with the Modeo brothers of Taranto.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero intrecciato legami con la criminalità salentina , in Puglia e i fratelli Modeo di Taranto

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Giorgi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali), dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle , dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: Romeo and Giorgi jointly ran an international drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 luglio 2014 nell'operazione della Guardia di Finanza Puerto Liberado viene sgominato un traffico di droga internazionale a capo delle famiglie Romeo e Giorgi

descriptions: Targeted together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: DLASTHR engaged in a turf war with the True Kings over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 2010s, gun violence was thought to be part of the gang's turf war over drug supply with its rival gang, the True Kings.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings were in conflict over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, conflict between DLASTHR and a young breakaway group known as 'True Kings', resulted in Drive by shootings, fire bombings and intimidation, as tensions over drug supply erupted between the two gangs.

descriptions: The Barbaro collaborated with the Black Uhlans in ecstasy trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico era gestito in collaborazione con l'associazione criminale di motociclisti dei Black Uhlans.

descriptions: The Coney Island gang and Navy Street gang were in conflict with the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: Both gangs initially worked together against the Morello family from Italian Harlem for control of the lucrative New York rackets

descriptions: The two Camorra gangs cooperated against the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: Both gangs initially worked together against the Morello family from Italian Harlem for control of the lucrative New York rackets

Westside Locos.description: Predominantly Latino-American street gang based in San Fernando Valley, Glendale, with history dating back to the 1950s. They reside mainly in the Riverside Rancho neighborhood and are known for murder. Their main subset is Chicos Malos or Lake street. The gang is part of a larger Locos 13 alliance throughout Los Angeles County.

descriptions: Westside Locos is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Avenues 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13

descriptions: Burbank 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13, Mara SalvaTrucha, North Hollywood Boyz 13. West Side Playboys 13, Burbank 13

descriptions: Chicos Malos is the main subset of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: their main subset or "clique" is Chicos Malos or "Lake street"

descriptions: CV Locos is part of the Locos 13 alliance with Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: This alliance includes the CV Locos of Compton est 1979

descriptions: Elmwood st 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13

descriptions: Flower Park Rifa was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Flower Park Rifa

descriptions: Justin Street Locos was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: It historically had other street clicks in Glendale such as justin street locos

descriptions: Mara SalvaTrucha is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13, Mara SalvaTrucha

descriptions: North Hollywood Boyz 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13, Mara SalvaTrucha, North Hollywood Boyz 13

descriptions: Salem st Cholos was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Salem st Cholos

descriptions: Simi Valley subset is a subset of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang also has a subset in Simi Valley est 1993

descriptions: Toonerville Rifa 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13

descriptions: Vanowen st Locos 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13

descriptions: West Side Playboys 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13, Avenues 13, Vanowen st Locos 13, Mara SalvaTrucha, North Hollywood Boyz 13. West Side Playboys 13

descriptions: Western Ave Little Locas was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Western Ave Little Locas

descriptions: Westside Locos of West LA is part of the Locos 13 alliance with Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: as well as the Westside Locos of West La est 1978

descriptions: The PKK lists the Bethnahrin National Council as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Bethnahrin National Council

descriptions: YDG-H was the youth wing of the PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: The Civil Protections Units (YPS) is the successor of the Patriotic Revolutionary Youth Movement (YDG-H), the youth wing of the PKK.

GAS Gang.description: British street gang based in Brixton, South London, formed in the late 2000s. Known for drug trafficking, murder, theft, and money laundering. Considered one of the most dangerous gangs in South London by 2012, responsible for multiple murders and violent incidents. Membership declined in the early 2010s due to incarceration of leaders.

descriptions: 150 is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some younger members of GAS Gang now referring to themselves as GAS Rockblock 150 (or Rockblock 150, and later simply 150).

descriptions: GAS Gang had a conflict with ABM.
edges.evidence_quote: This was the start of GAS Gang's conflict with Stockwell-based gang, ABM (All Bout Money).

descriptions: GAS Gang had conflict with DSN.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with Croydon-based gang DSN (Don't Say Nuttin).

descriptions: GAS Gang had conflict with GMG.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... GMG based in Peckham.

descriptions: Loughborough Bois merged with GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Another gang, Loughborough Bois based in Loughborough Junction, decided to merge with GAS Gang.

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Murder Zone.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as Murder Zone (MZ)

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Original Brooklyn Youths.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Original Brooklyn Youths (OBY) / Brooklyn Family Riders (BFR)

descriptions: Y28s, a predecessor of GAS Gang, emerged from the fragmentation of PDC.
edges.evidence_quote: PDC, which was the dominant gang in the area at the time, began to fragment due to many of its leaders being imprisoned. Various different groups emerged from this fragmentation, such as the Muslim Boys and Y28s

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Roadside G's.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Roadside G's.

descriptions: Siru is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some GAS Gang members from Somerleyton Estate now referring to themselves as GAS Siru or Siru.

descriptions: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.
edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: GAS Gang had conflict with TN1.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... TN1 (Trust No-One) based in Tulse Hill.

descriptions: Villa Road is a splinter group from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Another split-off occurred around Brixton Road, with a group of GAS Gang youngers forming a new group called Villa Road.

descriptions: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.
edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: Lobos Espejo and Lobos Sao-Box are in conflict over criminal control.
edges.evidence_quote: La facción denominada Lobos Espejo liderada por alias Calaca se disputa el control criminal en la provincia frente a Lobos Sao-Box

descriptions: Lobos Sao-Box is a dissident faction of Los Lobos.
edges.evidence_quote: La facción denominada Lobos Espejo liderada por alias Calaca se disputa el control criminal en la provincia frente a Lobos Sao-Box

descriptions: Anastasio group is a satellite group operating under Mazzarella clan's command.
edges.evidence_quote: The Anastasio group (led by Raffaele Anastasio) ran extortion rackets targeting local businesses in Sant’Anastasia to fund clan operations and support imprisoned members.

descriptions: Soai-kai originated as an affiliate of Sasada-ikka and later became independent.
edges.evidence_quote: The Soai-kai was formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi, then a member of a Yokohama -based bakuto group named the Sasada-ikka. Originally named the "Gyosui-kai" ( 魚水会 ) as an affiliate of the Sasada-ikka, the group was renamed the "Takatora-gumi" ( 高寅組 ) and again renamed the Soai-kai in 1955 when the group became independent from the Sasada-ikka.

Brothers for Life.description: Middle Eastern criminal organization based in South-Western Sydney, Australia, founded in 2007 by Bassam Hamzy. Involved in drug trafficking, violence, and gang wars, notably with the Alameddine crime network. Active in Sydney and Melbourne.

descriptions: Talal Alameddine brawled with Bassam Hamzy, founder of Brothers for Life.
edges.evidence_quote: Talal Alameddine got into a brawl with fellow Goulburn Correctional Centre inmate Bassam Hamzy, founder of the Brothers for Life organisation.

descriptions: Alameddine and Hamze families are rival criminal families in Australia engaged in feuds.
edges.evidence_quote: Often different rival criminal families are interlocked in feuds (e.g. Alameddine VS Hamze), resulting in a fair amount of violence.

descriptions: Alameddine crime network and Brothers for Life are in a feud resulting in shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: As of 2024, the ongoing feud between the Alameddine crime network and the Brothers for Life of the Hamzy family has led to at least 11 shooting deaths.

descriptions: The Alameddines are in a feud with the Hamzy/Hamze crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Since October 2020, the Alameddines have grown to public notoriety in connection to an extended feud they became involved in with the Hamzy/Hamze crime family

descriptions: The two groups are engaged in a violent feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Since October 2020, the Alameddines have grown to public notoriety in connection to an extended feud they became involved in with the Hamzy/Hamze crime family

descriptions: The Ahmad family are close allies of the Hamzys.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ahmads, close allies of the Hamzys

descriptions: Brothers for Life was in conflict with the Alameddine crime network from 2020 to 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2020 and 2022, the gang was again in the public eye as one side of a new conflict, then against the Alameddine crime network.

descriptions: Tensions between Brothers for Life and Alameddine crime network were ongoing as of December 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: On 18 December 2024, The Daily Telegraph released an article detailing a bizarre jail call between an accused Melbourne gunman, and an unknown associate of the Alameddine crime network, demonstrating that tensions between the crews were ongoing and had even gone interstate.

descriptions: Brothers for Life was closely allied with the Bandidos around 2008-2009.
edges.evidence_quote: During this time, B4L became closely allied with both MBM, and the Bandidos.

descriptions: Bandidos were aligned with MBM, which was absorbed by Brothers for Life, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos had previously been aligned with Sydney's MBM gang, which had since been absorbed by B4L.

descriptions: Masood Zakaria, a Brothers for Life member, was formerly a lieutenant in the Comanchero Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: Zakaria also used to be a lieutenant in the Comanchero Motorcycle Club under former sergeant-at-arms Tarek Zahed

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed DLASTHR, making it a part of the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: B4L took over in the area, absorbing the remnants of MBM, and prolific Assyrian street-gang DLASTHR (The Last Hour), including member Michael Odisho.

descriptions: Brothers for Life's Illawarra faction had animosity towards the Finks Motorcycle Club, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A principle motivation behind the activities of Featherstone's faction appeared to be the gang's animosity towards Troy Forniciari, the self-appointed leader of the Illawarra chapter of the Finks Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Brothers for Life was closely allied with the Muslim Brotherhood Movement around 2008-2009.
edges.evidence_quote: During this time, B4L became closely allied with both MBM, and the Bandidos.

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed MBM, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos had previously been aligned with Sydney's MBM gang, which had since been absorbed by B4L.

'Ndrina Gallico.description: The Gallico are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Palmi, Italy, active in extortion, drug trafficking, and infiltration of public contracts. They are the strongest family in the municipalities of Palmi, Barritteri, Melicuccà, and Seminara, and also operate in Rome. The clan has been involved in a long-running feud with the Parrello-Condello and Bruzzise clans, which ended in 1990. In 1994, Teresa Concetta Managò became the first female pentito of the 'Ndrangheta in a trial against the Gallico clan.

descriptions: The Bruzzise joined the Parrello-Condello side in a feud against the Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise

descriptions: A new explosion of the feud between Gallico and Bruzzise emerged in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi ultimi anni, grazie all'operazione Cosa mia del 2010 fanno emergere una nuova esplosione della faida tra i Gallico e i Bruzzise

descriptions: Condello and Gallico were in conflict in the Palmi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Palmi : scoppiata nel 1977 tra i Condello e i Gallico e durata più di un ventennio.

descriptions: Gallico and Bruzzise were in a feud that re-emerged in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi ultimi anni, grazie all'operazione "Cosa mia" del 2010 fanno emergere una nuova esplosione della faida tra i Gallico e i Bruzzise

descriptions: Gallico is allied with Morgante.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono in alleanza con i Morgante, gli Sgrò e gli Sciglitano

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Pesce in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con ... i Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: Gallico is allied with Sciglitano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono in alleanza con i Morgante, gli Sgrò e gli Sciglitano

descriptions: Gallico is allied with Sgrò.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono in alleanza con i Morgante, gli Sgrò e gli Sciglitano

descriptions: The Costantino were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Dinaro in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con i Dinaro di Melicuccà

descriptions: Gallico, Licciardi, and Filippone were arrested together for drug trafficking, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 21 marzo 2018 vengono effettuati 19 arresti a Roma di presunti elementi appartenenti al clan Licciardi della Camorra e ai Filippone e Gallico accusati di traffico di droga

descriptions: The Frisina were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: The Gramuglia were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Imerti-Condello-Fontana in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con ... gli Imerti - Condello -Fontana di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: The Mazzullo were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: These two factions were in conflict during the Faida di Palmi.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello -Condello

descriptions: Gallico and Parrello-Condello were in a feud starting in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello

descriptions: Gallico is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Gallico

descriptions: The Mandalari are allies of the Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Gallico

descriptions: The Parrello and Condello were in a feud against the Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello

descriptions: A feud (faida) broke out between Parrello and Gallico in 1986 after the murder of Parrello's boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1986, a causa dell'omicidio del capobastone Gaetano Parrello, scoppia una faida tra la 'ndrina e i Gallico .

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with Fischer Projects according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional ("Movement of National Restoration", MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional (MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

descriptions: The Axe Gang formed connections with the New Guangxi clique for mutual benefit.
edges.evidence_quote: Wang's organisation maintained its relevance by forming connections with other regional military factions, including elements of the New Guangxi clique.

Kompania Bello.description: Transnational Albanian-speaking cocaine-trafficking network that organized shipments from South America to Europe and coordinated wholesale distribution across EU member states. It was dismantled in 2020 after a five-year investigation codenamed Operation Los Blancos, resulting in over 100 arrests and seizures of nearly 4 tonnes of cocaine. The network negotiated directly with South American cartels and used encrypted communications and informal value transfer systems.

descriptions: Los Choneros are allied with Kompania Bello.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Clan del Golfo, Urías Rondón Front, Kompania Bello

descriptions: Los Lobos is allied with Kompania Bello.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Kompania Bello are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello

descriptions: Larry Foley, leader of the Greens, later became a leader of the Rocks Push after defeating Sandy Ross.
edges.evidence_quote: Larry Foley , later to be regarded as the 'Father of Australian Boxing', was the leader of a Roman Catholic larrikin gang known as the Greens.

descriptions: Faillace-Portoraro is a family affiliated with Forastefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Federico Faillace a Spezzano Albanese, presunto affiliato ai Forastefano, nonché capo dei Faillace-Portoraro

descriptions: Infobox lists Corporación Zeta Nueva Guardia Federada as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Corporación Zeta Nueva Guardia Federada

descriptions: Ferraiuolo clan is under the influence of the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the reports of the DIA about the Camorra, the Mazzarella clan... having numerous groups under their influence, as the Ferraiuolo clan.

descriptions: SSNA split from MTA due to disagreement with Khun Sa's leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: some Shan nationalists in the MTA disagreed with his leadership and formed a rival Shan organisation, the Shan State National Army (SSNA)

descriptions: UWSA was in conflict with Mong Tai Army until 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 1996 the United Wa State Army was involved in a conflict against the Shan Mong Tai Army led by drug kingpin Khun Sa

Ghetto Boys.description: The Ghetto Boys is a street gang based in New Cross, Lewisham and Deptford, South London. Formed in the 1970s on the Woodpecker Estate, it is primarily composed of Black British members. The gang has been involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, and robbery, and had a notable conflict with the Peckham Boys. By the mid-late 2000s, the gang declined and splintered, with offshoots like Shower and 814 emerging.

descriptions: 814 is an offshoot group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: an offshoot group from the Ghetto Boys, known as 814

descriptions: Black Mafia superseded the weakened Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Black Mafia (BM) was one of the gangs that superseded the now weakened and fragmented Ghetto Boys

descriptions: Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys

descriptions: Catford Wildcatz is a splinter group from Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Ghetto Boys members in Catford split off from the gang to form their own gang called the Catford Wildcatz

descriptions: Cherry Boys is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys

descriptions: Ghetto Boys and Peckham Boys were in a violent conflict during the 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang had a notably violent conflict with the Peckham Boys during the 2000s

descriptions: The two gangs agreed to a ceasefire and alliance by 2007/8.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007/8, after decades of conflict, the Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys had agreed to a ceasefire and alliance.

descriptions: Shower was formed by younger members of Ghetto Boys as a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: Younger members of the gang formed "Shower"

descriptions: Ghetto Boys allegedly had links with Shower Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: It is alleged the group had links with the Jamaican gang Shower Posse

descriptions: Tottenham Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)

descriptions: Woolwich Boys is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys

descriptions: Young Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)

descriptions: Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys engaged in a shootout.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2004, the Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys had an infamous shootout outside the Urban Music Awards

descriptions: Peckham Boys attacked a man mistaken for Ghetto Boys member.
edges.evidence_quote: On 17 September 2006, a man was shot and stabbed to death on the Woodpecker Estate in New Cross by the Peckham Boys, after being mistaken for a member of the Ghetto Boys.

descriptions: Exchange of shots between Ghetto Boys and Peckham Boys members.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2008, during an exchange of shots between a member of the Ghetto Boys and a Peckham Boys member, Polish care worker Magda Pniewska was hit by a stray bullet and died.

descriptions: Shower Syndicate was formed by TMD and Ghetto Boys members.
edges.evidence_quote: Together, members of TMD and the Ghetto Boys called themselves 'Shower Syndicate'.

Forming Kaos.description: Forming Kaos is a criminal street gang based in Costa Mesa, California, composed primarily of Mexican-American members. Originating as a party/tagger crew in the early 1990s, it evolved into a street gang by the late 1990s. The gang is affiliated with the Sureños and has documented ties to the Mexican Mafia. Its activities include drug trafficking, extortion, and violent crime.

descriptions: Forming Kaos has documented ties to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: FK is affiliated with the Sureños and has documented ties to the Mexican Mafia (La Eme).

Hermanos de Pistoleros Latinos.description: Mexican American prison gang founded by Chino Avitia in Texas during the early 1980s. It operates in Texas prisons and communities, particularly Laredo, and is active in Mexico with a large contingent in Nuevo Laredo. The gang has over 1,000 members and is involved in trafficking cocaine and marijuana from Mexico into the United States.

descriptions: Rollin' 60s is allied with Rollin' 40's NHC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: Rollin' 40s joined the alliance with Rollin' 90s and Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: AndAriel is affiliated with Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Lab 110, Bureau 121, Unit 180, AndAriel

descriptions: AndAriel is a unit of Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Lazarus is believed to have two units. AndAriel

Mob Piru.description: The Mob Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance and a criminal organization, part of the larger Bloods alliance. Based in East Compton, California, it is primarily African American and involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and arms trafficking. Suge Knight, co-founder of Death Row Records, is an affiliate. The set split from Lueders Park Piru at some point.

descriptions: Black P. Stones is especially affiliated with the Piru coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black P. Stones are affiliated with the Bloods alliance and especially with the Piru coalition.

descriptions: Mob Piru is listed as a rival of Cedar Block Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mob Piru , Palmer Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Mob Piru is part of the Bloods alliance.

descriptions: Mob Piru and Lueders Park Piru were allies but later developed a rivalry with shootings from 2009 to 2013.
